detail.description: Jorge Polanco singles on a line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Jorge Polanco singles on a soft ground ball to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Francisco Lindor to 3rd. Carson Benge to 2nd.
Jorge Polanco doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Tyler Tolbert. Carson Benge scores.
Jorge Polanco homers (1) on a fly ball to right field.
Jorge Polanco singles on a line drive to center fielder Jorge Barrosa.
Jorge Polanco singles on a ground ball to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo, deflected by third baseman Nolan Arenado. Francisco Lindor to 3rd. Bo Bichette to 2nd.
Jorge Polanco singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Paul Skenes. Juan Soto to 2nd.
Jorge Polanco doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Jorge Polanco singles on a line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Jorge Polanco hits a ground-rule double (1) on a line drive down the right-field line.
Jorge Polanco doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.
Jorge Polanco singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.
Jorge Polanco singles on a line drive to right fielder Jake Bauers. Bo Bichette scores.
Jorge Polanco singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
